political.s: Goods Unite Us F — Cathy family donations Republican + conservative-Christian causes. Buycott — anti-LGBTQ donation history; foundation has phased out some recipients. [goods-unite-us · buycott]

charity.s: $35M reported corporate giving in 2024 (~0.19% of revenue) via Chick-fil-A Foundation.
charity.amt: $6 million annually (2026 commitment); $16 million reported in 2018
charity.focus: Education, homelessness, hunger; previously youth/leadership development

environment.s: water pollution violation: $22K in federal penalties (Violation Tracker).

animals.s: Pew tracker: Chick-fil-A No Antibiotics Important to Human Medicine policy (revised from 'No Antibiotics Ever' in 2024). [Pew antibiotic-free partial]

health.s: 1 CPSC recall on record; sample hazard: the suction cup on the toy can come off.

topHazards.label: The suction cup on the toy can come off, presenting a choking hazard to young children.

sampleRecalls.title: CPSC and Chick-fil-A Inc. Announce Recall of "Planet Discovery" Kid's Meal Toy
sampleRecalls.description: The "Planet Discovery" toys are plastic disks (about 2 to 3 inches in diameter) with a suction cup (about 1.5 inch in diameter) on the back. The toys depict all of the planets plus the moon and the sun. Each toy comes in a plastic bag labeled "Planets: Collect Them All!" A paragraph on the bag also says: "Parents: Thi…
hazards: The suction cup on the toy can come off, presenting a choking hazard to young children.
injuries: Chick-fil-A has received seven reports that the suction cup on the toy came off. In one case, a child began choking, but the parent removed the suction cup before medical treatment was needed.

sampleRecords.final_narrative: An employee was delivering food to a customer's home. She walked up to the front door and a dog came running out from the house. The dog bit the employee's left knee. The employee was hospitalized with a stress-induced heart attack.

sampleRecords.event_description: Contact with hot objects or substances
sampleRecords.final_narrative: An employee was transporting buckets of hot oil to oil storage using a cart when the cart hit a bump, causing the oil to spill on his foot. He was hospitalized with second-degree burns and a loss of skin.

sampleRecords.nature: Cuts, lacerations, punctures without injury to internal structures
sampleRecords.event_description: Fall to lower level resulting in exposure or contact  unspecified
sampleRecords.final_narrative: An employee was descending an outdoor stairway with a hand truck. The employee slipped and fell, and their right hand was caught between the hand truck and the steps. The ring and middle fingers on the hand were lacerated.

sampleRecords.event_description: Pedestrian struck by forward-moving vehicle in nonroadway area
sampleRecords.final_narrative: An employee was taking orders at a drive-through. As they walked between two cars, the rear car accelerated and pinned the employee against the other car. They sustained a right leg fracture and a left leg muscle injury.

sampleRecords.event_description: Other fall to lower level, unspecified
sampleRecords.final_narrative: An employee was pulling a cooler cart onto a trailer's liftgate when the cart trapped his foot against the lip of the liftgate ramp. The liftgate was in the elevated position and the employee fell backward resulting in a open fracture to his right lower leg. The employee was hospitalized and required surgery.

news_items.title: Get free Chick-fil-A fries and free entrée this week - Times Union
news_items.summary: Chick-fil-A is offering customers a free order of fries and a free entrée during a promotional period this week.

news_items.title: Florida mother arrested for DUI after Chick-fil-A employee calls 911 - WILX
news_items.summary: A Chick-fil-A employee called 911 after observing a customer who appeared to be driving under the influence, leading to the Florida mother's DUI arrest.

recent_events.summary: A Chick-fil-A employee called 911 after observing a customer who appeared to be driving under the influence, leading to the Florida mother's DUI arrest.
